underlying_goal: Run tests for changed files and achieve 95%+ coverage across all check types, then fix lint warnings and resolve test failures
friction_detail: Tests had failures related to mock timing and process.exit issues that required multiple rounds of fixing, and the user interrupted twice at the end due to persistent test errors.
brief_summary: User wanted tests run with 95%+ coverage and lint fixes for changed files; coverage targets were met and lint was fixed, but residual test errors around graceful shutdown led to user frustration at the end.
